query:
SELECT eda.id, eda.epiDeliveryId, eda.epi_nome, eda.status, eda.employeeId,
       ed.id as delivery_id, ed.deletedAt
FROM epi_discount_alerts eda
LEFT JOIN epi_deliveries ed ON eda.epiDeliveryId = ed.id
WHERE eda.status = 'pendente';
